name: Land Combat
description: The base system is CHAINMAIL, one figure to one man or creature; melee may instead use the Alternative Combat System matrices (Vol. I), CHAINMAIL kill/drive-back scores counting as a single hit. Mass battles run at 20:1, single fantastic types fighting 1:1 or against one 20:1 figure. Melee runs ten rounds to the turn; invisible attackers cannot stay so and strike.

also.note: attack/defense: one roll per hit die
